headline: A Look At Mohawk Industries (MHK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: What recent performance tells you about Mohawk Industries (MHK) Mohawk Industries (MHK) has attracted attention after a recent share price move, with the stock last closing at $109.51 and showing mixed returns over the past year and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Mohawk Industries. The recent 13.8% 1 month share price return, following earlier 3 month weakness of 8.6%, contrasts with a 9.5% 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests momentum has picked up again after a softer...
